sht31_init.message0: Initialize SHT3x %1 sensor I2C address %2 I2C bus %3
sht31_init.tooltip: Initialize SHT3x temperature and humidity sensor with I2C address

sht31_heater_control.tooltip: Control the built-in heater of SHT3x sensor on/off

sht31_is_heater_enabled.tooltip: Check if the SHT3x sensor heater is enabled

sht31_reset.tooltip: Perform a soft reset on the SHT3x sensor

sht31_simple_read.tooltip: Read temperature or humidity data from SHT3x sensor
